description_long: This object consists of three rectangular, upright waste bins arranged side by side, each designated for a specific type of recyclable material: plastic, cans, and paper. The bins are made of a smooth, light gray material with colored labels and signage on the front, each featuring a different pastel color (blue for paper, green for cans, yellow for plastic) and corresponding images of the waste type. The tops of the bins are flat with a square opening for depositing waste, and each bin has a circular recycling symbol above the opening. The sides and backs of the bins are plain, with no visible handles or wheels. The bins are likely hollow inside to accommodate waste, and their sturdy, boxy design suggests they are intended for public or urban environments. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and functional, with clear visual cues for sorting recyclables.
description: A set of three modern, rectangular recycling bins for plastic, cans, and paper, each with colored labels and front signage. The bins are smooth, light gray, and feature open tops for easy waste disposal.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three bins with colored labels, recycling symbols, and clear signage for plastic, cans, and paper.
description_view_1: Side view showing the plain, smooth sides of the bins with no visible handles or signage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the unmarked, flat backs of the bins, emphasizing their uniform, rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain sides and the tops of the bins.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: Each bin has a colored label, recycling symbol, and waste type signage with images and text on the front.
